zh.Farneworth, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾法爾沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Hulton於大約1263年出生在英國藍卡爾蕾托 爾頓時，他的父親John de Hulton34歲，母親Joan de Manchester24歲。他於1295年與Agnes de Bowden在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1320年在英國藍卡爾博爾頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Hulton于大约1263年出生在英国藍卡爾蕾托 爾頓时，他的父亲John de Hulton34岁，母亲Joan de Manchester24岁。他于1295年与Agnes de Bowden在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1320年在英国藍卡爾博爾頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Hulton was born about 1263, in Little Hulton, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Hulton, was 34 and his mother, Joan de Manchester, was 24. He married Agnes de Bowden in 1295, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1320, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Hulton est né environ 1263, à Little Hulton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John de Hulton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Manchester, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Bowden en 1295, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1320, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Hulton um 1263 in Little Hulton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Hulton 34 und seine Mutter Joan de Manchester 24. Er hat 1295 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Bowden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bolton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Hulton è nato il circa 1263 nel Little Hulton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John de Hulton, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Manchester, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Bowden nel 1295, nel Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1320, nel Bolton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Hultonが約1263年にイギリスランカシュアイアリットル ハルトンで生まれた時，父John de Hultonは34歳，母Joan de Manchesterは24歳であった。1295年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターでAgnes de Bowdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Hulton(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 랭카실르 리틀 훌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Hulton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Manchester(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 Agnes de Bowden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Hulton nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Little Hulton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Hulton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Manchester, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Bowden em 1295, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Hulton родился около 1263 г. в местности литл хултон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Hulton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Manchester, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Bowden в 1295 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Hulton nació aproximadamente 1263, en Little Hulton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Hulton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de Manchester, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes de Bowden en 1295, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1320, en Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
